arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Will Red Devils sign Patrick Dorgu or Alvaro Fernandez before January deadline?
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly giving serious consideration to re-signing Alvaro Fernandez from Benfica before the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: 'It's normal': Man United told what Patrick Dorgu is thinking by Lecce boss before final week of the window
arts.sum: Lecce’s manager has been speaking about Patrick Dorgu with the Danish international being linked with a move to Manchester United. The Reds Devils are looking...

arts.ttl: Inter in Lecce to remain hot on the heels of Napoli
arts.sum: Inter are both the club with the most wins against Lecce in Serie A (29 of 37 matches, with four draws and four wins for the Salentini) and the team with the most goals scored (87) against the Giallorossi in the top-flight. Lecce have won only one of their last eight matches at the Via del Mare stadium against Inter in Serie A (D3 L4): 1-0 on 29th January 2012, with a goal by Guillermo Giacomazzi, under Serse Cosmi.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Serie A predictions including Lecce vs. Inter Milan
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Serie A fixtures, including Lecce vs. Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Man United consider exercising £15m buy-back option on Alvaro Fernandez as club struggle to agree fee with Lecce for top target Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are weighing up whether to exercise their buy-back clause for Alvaro Fernandez at Benfica if they can't agree a fee for Lecce's Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: “We Must Play a Courageous Match”: Giampaolo’s Bold Approach Against Inter
arts.sum: Lecce's head coach Marco Giampaolo previewed the upcoming Serie A match against Inter Milan with a mix of realism and determination. The post “We Must Play a Courageous Match”: Giampaolo’s Bold Approach Against Inter appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Lecce drop Dorgu hint to Manchester United with bid for Hearts full-back
arts.sum: Lecce dropped a hint that they are ready to sell Patrick Dorgu to Manchester United...

arts.ttl: Roma’s Pursuit of Frattesi: Inter’s Starting XI Decision Adds New Twist
arts.sum: The ongoing transfer saga surrounding Davide Frattesi has taken an unexpected turn as Inter Milan prepares to start the midfielder in their upcoming match against Lecce. This development comes amidst intense speculation linking Frattesi with a move to Roma before the January transfer window closes. The post Roma’s Pursuit of Frattesi: Inter’s Starting XI Decision Adds New Twist appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man United eye Álvaro Fernández as Patrick Dorgu fallback - source
arts.sum: United are keen to sign a left-back in the January window and are working on deals for both Fernandez and Dorgu. Manchester United are interested in re-signing Álvaro Fernández as an alternative to Lecce's Patrick Dorgu, a source has told ESPN,

arts.ttl: Inter ready to loan Palacios to Monza
